description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and history of Los Angeles, where the sun shines bright and the streets are alive with the spirit of creativity. This 3-day adventure is designed for the solo traveler eager to explore the world of MLB, indulge in shopping, and appreciate the local art scene. From iconic stadiums to hidden gems, this trip will offer a perfect blend of excitement and relaxation, all while keeping your budget in check. Get ready to discover the City of Angels!

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Griddle Cafe, famous for its oversized pancakes and delicious omelets. It's a local favorite, so be prepared for a bit of a wait!

Take a guided tour of Dodger Stadium, the iconic home of the Los Angeles Dodgers. You'll get a behind-the-scenes look at the stadium, including the press box and the field itself. Don't forget to snap some photos!
Enjoy a classic ballpark lunch at Dodger Stadium. Try the famous Dodger Dog or some nachos while soaking in the atmosphere of this historic venue.

Explore Chavez Ravine, the neighborhood surrounding Dodger Stadium. This area has a rich history and offers beautiful views of the stadium and downtown Los Angeles. It's a great spot for a leisurely walk.
Head over to Echo Park Lake for a relaxing afternoon. Rent a paddle boat or simply stroll around the lake while enjoying the views of the city skyline and the iconic row of lotus flowers.
Visit the MLB Store in Los Angeles to pick up some official merchandise. Whether you're looking for jerseys, caps, or other fan gear, this is the place to find it!
End your day with a classic California experience at In-N-Out Burger. Enjoy a delicious burger and fries, and don't forget to try their secret menu!

days.title: Art and Culture in the City

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Griddle Cafe, famous for its oversized pancakes and delicious omelets. It's a local favorite, so be prepared for a bit of a wait, but the food is worth it!

Explore The Getty Center, an architectural marvel that houses an impressive collection of European paintings, sculptures, and decorative arts. The gardens and views of Los Angeles are equally stunning, making it a perfect spot for art lovers.
No trip to California is complete without a stop at In-N-Out Burger. Enjoy a classic burger and fries at this iconic fast-food chain, known for its fresh ingredients and secret menu.

Head to Santa Monica Pier for a leisurely stroll. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere, take a ride on the Ferris wheel, and soak in the ocean views. Don't forget to snap some photos with the iconic pier sign!

Just a short walk from the pier, Third Street Promenade offers a variety of shops and boutiques. It's a great place to find MLB merchandise and other souvenirs. Enjoy the street performances as you shop!
End your day with a seafood dinner at The Lobster, located right by the pier. Enjoy fresh lobster and other seafood dishes while taking in the beautiful sunset views over the ocean.
After a fulfilling day of art, culture, and shopping, head back to your hotel to relax and recharge for tomorrow's adventures.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Griddle Cafe, famous for its oversized pancakes and delicious omelets. It's a local favorite that will fuel you for a day of exploration!
Stroll along Hollywood Boulevard, where you can see the iconic Walk of Fame and the TCL Chinese Theatre. Don't forget to snap a photo with your favorite star's star!
No trip to California is complete without a stop at In-N-Out Burger. Enjoy a classic burger and fries at this beloved fast-food chain, known for its fresh ingredients and secret menu.
Head to Melrose Avenue for some unique shopping. This trendy street is lined with boutiques, vintage shops, and street art, perfect for finding that special fan merchandise or a unique souvenir.

activities.activity: Visit LACMA (Los Angeles County Museum of Art)
activities.description: Spend your afternoon at LACMA, the largest art museum in the west. Explore its impressive collection of art, including works from various cultures and time periods. Don't miss the iconic Urban Light installation!
activities.searchQuery: Los Angeles County Museum of Art

activities.activity: Dinner at The Bazaar by José Andrés
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful dinner at The Bazaar, where you can experience innovative Spanish cuisine in a vibrant atmosphere. It's a great way to end your trip with a culinary treat!

activities.activity: Shopping for MLB Merchandise at the MLB Store
activities.description: Before you leave, visit the MLB Store to pick up some official merchandise. Whether it's a jersey or a cap, it's the perfect way to remember your trip and show your support for your favorite team!
